title: How to get dependency type (FS, SS, etc.) via API?

posts.author: aliamer (ali)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I’m using the dependency column and can get linked_item_ids, but I can’t find any way to get the dependency type (like Finish-to-Start, Start-to-Start, etc.) via the API.

Is there a way to retrieve this info programmatically?
Thanks!
